landing.badge: Built by Hetesh and Yashita for Financial Compliance
landing.heroDescription: A coordinated architecture built for the financial sector. It detects voice clones, deepfakes, and synthetic fraud directly as they happen, using a
landing.heroDescEnd: to enforce strictly human physical limits that algorithms cannot fake.
landing.statVoiceClone: Rise in Voice Clone Fraud Since 2023
landing.statLayers: Forensic Detection Layers with Biological Veto
landing.featuresSubtitle: A platform of specialized analysis engines working in tandem for the financial sector, providing clear and auditable guardrails at every level.
landing.featureVoiceDesc: Combining deep acoustic forensics with our Biological Veto System to identify synthetic voices by analyzing natural human physical limitations. Transparent, accurate, and completely documented.
landing.featureMediaDesc: Analyzing images and videos to flag manipulated financial documents and rapidly spot deepfake video content.
landing.featureBiometricDesc: Identity verification and voiceprint enrollment operating natively without lag, establishing a highly secure identity layer.
landing.featureMonitorDesc: Protecting voice channels against synthetic fraud, coercion, and spoofing. We stop threats within seconds and maintain an unbroken audit log.
landing.whySubtitle: Security and compliance built specifically for the financial sector. Every decision is fully transparent, clearly explained, and rooted in human biology.
landing.whyGuardrailsDesc: Our architecture evaluates the physical limits of human speech to catch what models miss, keeping synthetic clones out of your systems.
landing.whyDetectionDesc: By tracking breathing patterns and timing alongside deep acoustic analysis, we identify deepfake voices within seconds of connection.
landing.whyAuditsDesc: Every flagged interaction generates a complete report detailing exactly why the alert was triggered, easily satisfying regulatory requirements.
landing.ctaDescription: Protect your institution and your clients. Integrate Satya Drishti to secure your architecture from the rising tide of sophisticated synthetic fraud.
landing.featureScannerDesc: Upload any image or video for instant AI forensic analysis to detect deepfakes.
landing.featureCallProtectionDesc: Real-time voice and video deepfake detection during phone and video calls.
landing.featureCaseTrackingDesc: Save evidence, build cases, and generate official reports for authorities.
landing.step1Desc: Upload the suspicious image or video you received.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI runs 5 forensic checks in seconds.
landing.step3Desc: Receive an instant verdict with a downloadable evidence report.
landing.trustDesc: Files are analyzed locally and never stored on our servers. No data is shared with third parties. Your identity remains protected.

about.title: About Satya Drishti
about.subtitle: Defending Human Integrity
about.missionDesc: In a world where synthetic media is becoming indistinguishable from reality, Satya Drishti stands as a forensic firewall. We are a multi-modal neural artifact analysis platform designed to protect individuals, families, and financial institutions from increasingly sophisticated deepfake and voice-cloning attacks.
about.crisisDesc: Voice cloning scams have surged 500% since 2023, costing Indian families ₹1,947 crore in fraudulent transactions. A single cloned voice call can be indistinguishable from a loved one, leading to devastating financial and emotional consequences.
about.techDesc: Satya Drishti employs a 9-layer forensic detection pipeline with a Biological Veto System. We don't just 'guess' at authenticity—we perform a surgical dissection of media bits. Our pipeline looks for the phantom echoes of neural generation, the micro-inconsistencies in eye-glint patterns, and the synthetic tremors in cloned audio.

liveDemo.title: Live Forensic Demo
liveDemo.subtitle: Watch Satya Drishti in action — real-time analysis, real threats neutralized.

help.title: Help & Resources
help.subtitle: Find answers and get the support you need

faq.whatIsDeepfakeAnswer: A deepfake is AI-generated or AI-manipulated media (image, video, or audio) that makes it appear as if someone said or did something they never actually did. They can be used for fraud, blackmail, or harassment.
faq.howAccurateAnswer: Our scanner uses 5 different forensic checks including frequency analysis, metadata verification, and neural pattern detection. While no system is 100% perfect, our multi-check approach provides high confidence results.
faq.isPrivateAnswer: Yes. Files are analyzed and never stored permanently. We do not share any data with third parties. If you create an account, only your scan results (not the files) are saved for your convenience.
faq.howToReport: How do I report a deepfake crime?
faq.howToReportAnswer: Call the National Cyber Crime Helpline at 1930, or file a complaint at cybercrime.gov.in. Download your evidence report from the Scanner to include with your complaint.
faq.whatEvidenceAnswer: Save the original suspicious media, download the Satya Drishti evidence report, take screenshots of any threatening messages, and note the source where you received the media.
